name: [ES-CMP][V3.1] Create and Update Tasks for Supporting Activity

reason.description: Present when execution_status is 'Failed'. Explains why the agent stopped.

task_id.description: The ID of the newly created task when execution_status is 'Task created successfully'.

campaign_id.description: The mapped campaign ID used to create the task.

cmp_task_url.description: The URL of the created CMP task when execution is successful.

description: create tasks based on the values for Supporting Activity field and update metadata of the tasks accordingly
prompt_template:
## Input 1. [[supporting_activity_object]]​ will be an object containing: "task_id", "task_title", "campaign_id", "cmp_task_url", "supporting_activity", "work_request_id", "due_date" and "owner_email_address" 2. Define supporting_activity_mapping_object : ``` { "Emailing": { "workflow_name": "Workflow: Email", "workflow_id": "60460415ac2c1a0459c3684a", "template_name" : "Email Marketing", "template_id" : "d6f6638142604f309b4d7bbcb431d323" }, "Sales Enablement Asset": { "workflow_name": "Workflow: Sales Enablement Asset", "workflow_id": "68fa02a6ce4308b8e76aa846", "template_name" : "Sales Enablement Asset", "template_id" : "c21da80e73a9440397bb95d03bc7962b" }, "Social Organic": { "workflow_name": "Workflow: Social Organic (MARKETING)", "workflow_id": "6852e8791dd1e03b8e2856d3", "template_name" : "Social Organic", "template_id" : "eb7e08e114c4419aacf7673ae76e91d5" }, "Social paid": { "workflow_name": "Workflow: Social paid (MARKETING)", "workflow_id": "6908bc7f42a129af861c64b7", "template_name" : "Social Paid", "template_id" : "32321bf61a0242e69de117f5b21a80c0" }, "Trade media": { "workflow_name": "Workflow: Trade media (MARKETING)", "workflow_id": "68810314f5a803237b0a34e7", "template_name" : "Trade Media", "template_id" : "cd6e7dbcde704aaeb4e90441e2e874de" }, "Webpage": { "workflow_name": "Workflow: Webpage (MARKETING)", "workflow_id": "6908bc2242a129af861af1d5", "template_name" : "Brief: Webpage", "template_id" : "b53dd4b0bf9a490fa5ac10bec6801ba2" }, "Paid Search": { "workflow_name": "Workflow: Paid Search", "workflow_id": "63da5aa073a78d490ae9a241", "template_name" : "Brief: Paid Search", "template_id" : "08134ff11ca04211b5d53ab4c4793851" }, "Publication": { "workflow_name": "Workflow: Publication", "workflow_id": "6034ddf9cd647d041c46d62e", "template_name" : "", "template_id" : "" }, "Paid Display": { "workflow_name": "Workflow: Paid Display", "workflow_id": "", "template_name" : "Paid Display", "template_id" : "" } } ``` --- ## Process 1. call `get_cmp_resource` with 1. resource_type = "work_request" 2. resource_id = `work_request_id` 2. from output_object, generate a readable summary of all associated form fields where each form field related information should be new line separated skipping any h tag based text; lets consider it to be `work_request_fields_summary` 3. Let supporting_activity_value = [[supporting_activity_object]]["supporting_activity"] 1. Split supporting_activity_value on "," 2. Trim spaces. Example: `"Emailing, Event, Paid Search" → "Emailing", "Event", "Paid Search"` 3. let supporting_activity_values_list = processed supporting_activity_value 4. For supporting_activity_value in supporting_activity_values_list 1. call `create_task` with: 1. title = "{supporting_activity_value} {[[supporting_activity_object]]["task_title"]}" 2. campaign_id = [[supporting_activity_object]]["campaign_id"] 3. due_date = [[supporting_activity_object]]["due_date"] 4. IF supporting_activity_value is a key in supporting_activity_mapping_object, 1. workflow_id = supporting_activity_mapping_object[supporting_activity_value]["workflow_id"] 1. IF not workflow_id, skip workflow_id 2. from output_object, set task_url=output_object["link"] 1. extract newly_created_task_id by splitting task_url based on right most "/". Example : `"https://cmp.optimizely.com/cloud/taskv3/693724fa9acfcaed281bb8b1" -> "693724fa9acfcaed281bb8b1"` 3. IF supporting_activity_value is a key in supporting_activity_mapping_object, 1. let template_id = supporting_activity_mapping_object[supporting_activity_value]["template_id"] 1. IF template_id has value, call `update_task_brief` with : 1. task_id = newly_created_task_id 2. brief_form_template_id = template_id 3. update_summary="update all required field values with the value 'choose' and 'Description' field value with the value of - {`work_request_fields_summary`}" 4. call `update_work_request_resource_link` with : 1. action = "link" 2. resource_type = "task" 3. resource_id = newly created task_id 5. maintain a task_url_list which will be a numbered list containing all newly created cmp_task_url 5. Call `send_email` with:\ recipient_emails = [[supporting_activity_object]] ["owner_email_address"]\ cc_emails = ["[Neil.Mullarkey@optimizely.com](mailto:Neil.Mullarkey@optimizely.com)", "[suriya.disha@optimizely.com](mailto:suriya.disha@optimizely.com)", "[Nicola.Dack@optimizely.com](mailto:Nicola.Dack@optimizely.com)", "[mehreen.rahman@optimizely.com](mailto:mehreen.rahman@optimizely.com)"]\ subject = "Supporting Activity Tasks Created from Work Request in CMP"\ body = ```

Hi

Here are the links to the newly created tasks from Supporting Activity: {task_url_list}

Thank you!

``` 6. After all steps succeed,\ return this object ``` { "execution_status": "Tasks created successfully", "task_urls": task_url_list } ``` 7. If any tool call fails, OR the returned task_id is null, OR any unexpected value occurs\ call `send_email` with: 1. recipient_emails = [[supporting_activity_object]] ["owner_email_address"] 2. cc_emails = ["[Neil.Mullarkey@optimizely.com](mailto:Neil.Mullarkey@optimizely.com)", "[mehreen.rahman@optimizely.com](mailto:mehreen.rahman@optimizely.com)", "[Nicola.Dack@optimizely.com](mailto:Nicola.Dack@optimizely.com)", "[suriya.disha@optimizely.com](mailto:suriya.disha@optimizely.com)"] 3. subject = "Task creation failed in CMP" 4. body = ```

The task creation process failed during execution. Please check workflow logs in Agent Builder.

" ``` 5. return ``` { "execution_status": "Failed", "reason": "Task creation failed during execution." } ```
